title: Formatting long text boxes within forms
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to see if it is possible to added formatting to the long text boxes within forms.  I am trying to create bullets without having to use the dash.  Curious if this is possible?

posts.author: juztn24 (JC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I am trying to see if it is possible to added formatting to the long text boxes within forms. I am trying to create bullets without having to use the dash. Curious if this is possible?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @juztn24! At this time, it isn’t currently possible to customise or format the long text column within forms, sorry for the inconvenience! This is an awesome suggestion however, and feedback we will share internally
